top_signals.title: Philippines deploys US-made Triton naval drones in its western waters to scout for intruders
top_signals.summary: The transfer comes after the military revealed that China discreetly deployed a 6x6 meter floating platform equipped with an antenna at Scarborough Shoal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Down Jones Up, S&P 500 and Nasdaq Down | Closing Bell
top_signals.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Stablecoin’ Google searches down 54% as supply growth stalls after 2025 boom
top_signals.summary: The decline in search volumes this month coincides with aggregate stablecoin supply having reversed its 10-month expansion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Putin’s system is in a state of slow implosion - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Putin’s system is in a state of slow implosion  Financial Times
